domain: Personal finance and budgeting app. Users link bank accounts via Plaid to track spending, set budget goals, and analyze transaction patterns across categories.

personas.name: budget-conscious
personas.description: A young professional tracking every dollar. Has a checking and savings account, spends on restaurants, groceries, subscriptions, and transport. Sets strict monthly budgets per category. 3 months of transaction history with some overspending patterns.

personas.name: high-earner
personas.description: A senior engineer with multiple accounts (checking, savings, credit card, investment). Higher spending across dining, travel, and electronics. Loose budgets, more focused on savings rate. 6 months of data.
